parent_axis_record.def: 1: ignores property entirely · 2: notices objects in passing · 3: tracks valuables but doesn't act · 4: subtle attempts (sleight, lifting unattended things) · 5: actively pilfers everything not bolted down, brazen

hypothesis.def2: 1: oblivious to environs · 5: hyper-aware of surroundings while looting
hypothesis.rationale: The parent axis conflates the clinical, low-profile searching of the 'steals' context with the high-arousal, desperate energy of 'romances-and-steals', which creates a variance in perceived 'aggressiveness'.
